infrastructure.name: Stronghold
infrastructure.description: Each time a player who is part of this Infrastructure's Alliance wins a battle at this or a connected district, they can treat their Alliance's Power Level at that district as 1 higher or lower than it actually is for the purposes of that battle's Campaign Outcomes.

infrastructure.name: Bribed Authorities
infrastructure.description: For players who are part of this Infrastructure's Alliance, districts at a distance of 2 from this district are considered connected to it, but not vice versa.

infrastructure.name: Sympathetic inhabitants
infrastructure.description: Each time a player who is part of this Infrastructure's Alliance wins a battle at this or a connected district, they can treat that district as 1 higher or lower than it actually is for the purposes of multiple Influenced inhabitants benefits. The effect of multiple Influenced inhabitants is not cumulative (so can only take effect once in each battle).

infrastructure.name: Fortifications
infrastructure.description: The minimum Power Level of this Infrastructure's Alliance in this district is increased by 1. When this Infrastructure is built, if it increases the minimum Power Level of its Alliance above its current Power Level at this district, increase the Power Level accordingly. Each time a rule would reduce that Alliance's Power Level below that point, one of that Alliance's Fortification Lines in that district is destroyed instead.
